pattern: A single traversal that compares every node against the root's value answers uni-valuedness, short-circuiting the moment any node differs.
hints: Pick a reference value once; the whole tree must match it.
The root's value is the only value any node is allowed to have.
Walk every node comparing its value to the root's; return false on the first mismatch, true if you finish.

edge_inputs.description: all ones across an unbalanced shape
one deep node breaks the property
root differs from a single child
mismatch hidden at the deepest leaf

stress.description: mostly uni-valued trees with an occasional injected mismatch
stress.note: root is always present and equals the base value
